description: FutSpring Codebase Refactoring for Scalability — extract FileUploadService, UserAuthenticationHelper, split DailyService into sub-services, extract frontend custom hooks, and extract reusable ProfilePage components.

userStories.title: Extract FileUploadService
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single FileUploadService so that file upload logic is not duplicated across DailyService, PeladaService, and UserService.
acceptanceCriteria: New @Service FileUploadService created at backend/src/main/java/com/futspring/backend/service/FileUploadService.java
FileUploadService injects @Value("${app.uploads.dir:uploads}") private String uploadsDir

FileUploadService.uploadImage(MultipartFile file): String performs 5MB check, JPEG/PNG/WebP MIME validation, UUID filename generation, saves file; throws AppException(INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, "Failed to store file") on IOException
FileUploadService.deleteImage(String filename): void deletes file from uploadsDir; no-ops if file does not exist
DailyService.uploadChampionImage delegates to FileUploadService.uploadImage
PeladaService.uploadPeladaImage delegates to FileUploadService.uploadImage and FileUploadService.deleteImage
UserService.storeFile delegates to FileUploadService.uploadImage
deleteOldFile() helper removed from PeladaService and UserService
Tests updated to pass mock FileUploadService
All existing tests pass; ./mvnw compile succeeds

userStories.title: Extract UserAuthenticationHelper
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a shared UserAuthenticationHelper component so that the user-lookup-or-throw pattern is not written 32 times across 6 services.
acceptanceCriteria: New @Component UserAuthenticationHelper created at backend/src/main/java/com/futspring/backend/helper/UserAuthenticationHelper.java
UserAuthenticationHelper.getAuthenticatedUser(String email): User calls userRepository.findByEmail(email).orElseThrow(...) with AppException(HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND, "User not found")
All 17 find-or-throw occurrences in DailyService replaced
All 9 find-or-throw occurrences in PeladaService replaced
The find-or-throw occurrence in ChatService replaced
The find-or-throw occurrence in RankingService replaced
The find-or-throw occurrence in AwardsService replaced
AuthService explicitly excluded
grep for findByEmail in services (excluding AuthService) returns zero matches
Tests updated to pass mock UserAuthenticationHelper
All existing tests pass; ./mvnw compile succeeds

userStories.title: Split DailyService — Extract DailyAttendanceService
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a dedicated DailyAttendanceService so that attendance logic is isolated and independently testable.
acceptanceCriteria: New @Service DailyAttendanceService containing: confirmAttendance, disconfirmAttendance, adminConfirmAttendance, adminDisconfirmAttendance
DailyAttendanceService exposes package-accessible clearAttendees(Daily daily): void
Each method uses UserAuthenticationHelper for user lookup
Delegation stubs stay in DailyService
Unit tests for DailyAttendanceService
All existing tests pass; ./mvnw compile succeeds

userStories.title: Split DailyService — Extract DailyTeamManagementService
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a dedicated DailyTeamManagementService so that team management logic is isolated and independently testable.
acceptanceCriteria: New @Service DailyTeamManagementService containing: sortTeams, swapPlayers, updateTeamName, updateTeamColor
DailyTeamManagementService exposes package-accessible clearTeams(Daily daily): void
Shared DailyDTOMapper component extracted to hold buildTeamDTO
Each method uses UserAuthenticationHelper for user lookup
Delegation stubs stay in DailyService
Unit tests for DailyTeamManagementService
All existing tests pass; ./mvnw compile succeeds

userStories.title: Split DailyService — Extract DailyResultsService
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a dedicated DailyResultsService so that match submission, results finalisation, champion image upload, and message parsing are isolated from lifecycle management.
acceptanceCriteria: New @Service DailyResultsService containing: submitResults, finalizeDaily, uploadChampionImage, populateFromMessage
No circular dependency: finalizeDaily and populateFromMessage return void
DailyResultsService exposes package-accessible clearResults(Daily daily, Pelada pelada): void
persistLiveLeagueTable private method inside DailyResultsService
Each method uses UserAuthenticationHelper for user lookup
Delegation stubs stay in DailyService
Unit tests for DailyResultsService.finalizeDaily and submitResults
All existing tests pass; ./mvnw compile succeeds

userStories.title: Slim DailyService to Thin Orchestrator
userStories.description: As a developer, I want DailyService to be a thin orchestrator so that its sole responsibility is lifecycle management.
acceptanceCriteria: DailyService retains only: createDaily, getDailiesForPelada, updateStatus, deleteDaily, getDailyDetail
deleteDaily orchestrates teardown via sub-services in correct order
DailyService has no direct calls to attendance, team-management, or results repositories
DailyService uses UserAuthenticationHelper for all remaining user lookups
Final line count under 300 lines
Unit test for DailyService.deleteDaily
All existing tests pass; ./mvnw compile succeeds
Create docs/adr/001-daily-service-split.md with Context, Decision, Consequences

userStories.title: Extract usePeladaDetail() from PeladaDetailPage
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a custom hook to encapsulate all data fetching in PeladaDetailPage.
acceptanceCriteria: usePeladaDetail(id: string) hook created at frontend/src/components/pelada/hooks/usePeladaDetail.ts
Hook consolidates four data-fetching concerns with own loading flags
Hook returns { pelada, dailies, ranking, awards, loading, rankingLoading, dailiesLoading, awardsLoading, error, refetch }
PeladaDetailPage replaces fetch pairs with usePeladaDetail(id)
rankingSort state and sortedRanking remain on the page
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Phase 2 — begin after all Phase 1 stories pass

userStories.title: Verify and Align Tab Component Props with usePeladaDetail()
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to confirm that tab components correctly receive data as props derived from usePeladaDetail() after US-007.
acceptanceCriteria: Each tab component receives data exclusively via props from PeladaDetailPage
No tab component issues a direct API call that did not exist before
Prop types updated if needed
All four tabs render identically to pre-extraction
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Extract useDailyDetail() from DailyDetailPage
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a useDailyDetail() hook so that data-fetching state is encapsulated.
acceptanceCriteria: useDailyDetail(id: string) hook created at frontend/src/components/daily/hooks/useDailyDetail.ts
Hook consolidates: daily data, loading flag, error, isAdmin flag, formattedDate derived value
Hook exposes stable refetch callback
selectedPlayer and swapLoading remain at page level
DailyDetailPage replaces corresponding useState/useEffect/useCallback calls
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Extract useDailyModals() from DailyDetailPage
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a useDailyModals() hook so that all modal and dialog visibility state is separated from data state.
acceptanceCriteria: useDailyModals() hook created at frontend/src/components/daily/hooks/useDailyModals.ts
Hook manages: resultsOpen, finalizeOpen, importOpen, uploadLoading, statusDialog, statusLoading
Hook returns open/close/set handlers
fileInputRef stays co-located with uploadLoading
DailyDetailPage replaces corresponding useState calls
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Extract usePlayerSelection() Shared Hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a shared usePlayerSelection() hook so that player-selection lists in FinalizeModal and ResultsModal are managed consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: usePlayerSelection(initialSelected?: number[]) hook created at frontend/src/components/daily/hooks/usePlayerSelection.ts
Hook exposes { selected: number[], toggle(playerId: number): void, reset(): void }
FinalizeModal calls usePlayerSelection() twice for puskasIds and wiltballIds
PlayerCheckboxList sub-component updated to receive props from hook instances
ResultsModal replaces inline player-selection state with usePlayerSelection()
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Split ResultsModal.tsx
userStories.description: As a developer, I want ResultsModal split into focused files so that form state, business logic, and rendering are separately maintainable.
acceptanceCriteria: buildPlayerStats pure function extracted to frontend/src/utils/matchStats.ts
useMatchResults(daily, onSubmit) hook created at frontend/src/components/daily/hooks/useMatchResults.ts
ResultsForm.tsx created at frontend/src/components/daily/ResultsForm.tsx
Original ResultsModal.tsx refactored to thin shell
ResultsForm renders same input fields as original
Validation and submission work identically
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Extract ProfilePage Inline Components
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Stars, SkeletonBlock, and ProfileSkeleton extracted from ProfilePage.tsx so they are reusable.
acceptanceCriteria: Stars component created as named export from frontend/src/components/profile/Stars.tsx
SkeletonBlock component created as named export from frontend/src/components/profile/SkeletonBlock.tsx
ProfileSkeleton component created as named export from frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileSkeleton.tsx
frontend/src/components/profile/index.ts barrel file created/updated to re-export all three
ProfilePage.tsx imports all three from '../components/profile'
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Phase 3 — independent of US-011 and US-012
